about_intro: Welcome to the TanStack demo application. This section showcases various features and integrations built with modern web technologies.
about_router: TanStack Router for powerful routing and navigation
about_query: TanStack Query for server state management
about_form: TanStack Form for flexible form handling
about_clerk: Clerk for authentication and user management
about_convex: Convex for backend database and real-time features
about_ai: AI integrations for chat, image generation, and more
about_explore_desc: Navigate through the different demo sections using the menu to see these technologies in action. Each demo is designed to showcase specific capabilities and best practices.
about_note: Note: This demo section will be removed in future versions of the application.
pricing_page_subtitle: Choose the right plan for your business. All plans include our core features with flexible options to suit your needs.
pricing_plan_starter_description: Perfect for small businesses just starting with sustainability reporting
pricing_plan_professional_description: Ideal for businesses needing comprehensive climate accounting
pricing_plan_enterprise_description: For large organizations requiring maximum flexibility and support
pricing_faq_subtitle: Have questions about VSME reporting or our platform? Find quick answers below.
pricing_faq_a1: VSME (Voluntary Sustainability for Micro and Small Enterprises) reporting is a framework developed by the EU to help small and medium-sized businesses report on their sustainability practices and performance. It follows simplified standards compared to the more comprehensive CSRD (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive) required for larger companies.
pricing_faq_q2: How long does it take to implement your platform?
pricing_faq_a2: Most SMBs can get started with our platform in just 1-2 days. Our guided setup process walks you through each step, and our support team is available to help with any questions. The actual reporting process becomes significantly faster once you're set up in the system.
pricing_faq_q3: What if I don't have experience with sustainability reporting?
pricing_faq_a3: Our platform is specifically designed for businesses without prior experience with sustainability reporting. The system provides step-by-step guidance, explanations of key concepts, and templates tailored to your industry. Our support team includes sustainability experts who can answer your questions.
pricing_faq_a4: We offer flexible pricing plans based on business size and reporting needs. Custom enterprise plans are available for businesses with more complex requirements. All plans include regular updates to stay compliant with changing regulations.
pricing_faq_q5: Can I export reports to share with stakeholders?
pricing_faq_a5: Yes, you can easily export your full sustainability reports in multiple formats including PDF and Excel. This makes it easy to share with stakeholders, investors, banks, or customers who require documentation of your sustainability initiatives.
